message:
feat(types): add explicit-instant checkpoint recording to CheckpointState

CheckpointState::record() and record_with_message() called Instant::now()
internally, preventing deterministic testing and replay.

Changes:
- Refactor record() to delegate to new record_at(at: Instant)
- Refactor record_with_message() to delegate to new
  record_with_message_at(message, at: Instant)
- Original methods preserved as convenience wrappers using Instant::now()
- Add test_checkpoint_state_record_at: verifies explicit instant storage,
  message clearing, and count increment
- Add test_checkpoint_state_record_with_message_at: verifies explicit
  instant storage, message persistence, and count increment

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
